hero.title: The World's Healthiest Ergonomic Office Chair
hero.subtitle: Experience active sitting that promotes movement, improves posture, and eliminates back pain. NEAT Certified by Mayo Clinic.

intro.label: Active Sitting Revolution
intro.title: Move While You Sit
intro.p1: Research shows it doesn't matter whether we sit or stand—we need to MOVE. CoreChair targets sitting disease through its patented 14-degree multidirectional active sitting mechanism.
intro.p2: Our innovative design focuses on pelvic stability to provide postural support with naturally balanced positioning of your pelvis, spine, and head.
intro.p3: Experience improved joint mobility in hips, pelvis, and spine while boosting blood flow, muscle activity, and calorie burn.

elite.label: New Release
elite.title: Introducing CoreChair ELITE
elite.description: All the benefits of the Classic, now with flexible upper thoracic support. A tall back that moves with you, providing support when you need to sit back and relax.

items.title: Reduced Back Pain
items.desc: Pelvic support prevents slumping and optimizes posture

items.title: Brain Power
items.desc: Increased blood flow keeps you alert and creative

items.title: Core Strength
items.desc: Movement builds strength—use it or lose it

research.label: Research Validated
research.title: Backed by Science
research.p1: Cornell University research shows CoreChair exerts less pressure points than standard ergonomic chairs.
research.p2: Mayo Clinic NEAT certification confirms 20% increase in caloric burn compared to traditional chairs.

trial.title: 60-Day Risk-Free Trial
trial.desc: Try CoreChair in your own space. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right with free returns and expert fitting support.

hero.title: The Benefits of Active Sitting
hero.subtitle: Transform your health, one sit at a time

main.label: Health Benefits
main.title: Why Active Sitting Matters
main.intro: Traditional sitting creates a cascade of health issues. CoreChair's active sitting technology addresses the root causes of sitting disease.

items.title: Reduced Back Pain
items.desc: Pelvic support provides the foundation for a balanced, healthy spine. Our sculpted seat and strategic support prevent slumping, optimize posture, and significantly reduce back pain and discomfort.

items.title: Enhanced Brain Power
items.desc: Increased blood flow to the brain keeps you alert, creative, and productive. Users report feeling more engaged and energized throughout the workday.

items.title: Core Strength Building
items.desc: Movement is the key to maintaining core strength. CoreChair's gentle, continuous micro-movements engage your core stabilizing muscles throughout the day.

items.title: Superior Pelvic Support
items.desc: Our seat cushion works with the pelvic stabilizer to maintain optimal position. This unique design cradles your pelvis, enhancing sitting posture and minimizing pain.

items.title: 20% More Calorie Burn
items.desc: Movement burns calories and helps manage weight and mood. Mayo Clinic research confirms CoreChair increases metabolic demand by 20% over traditional chairs.

items.title: Improved Circulation
items.desc: Say goodbye to swollen ankles. Movement stimulates circulation throughout your body, helping your heart pump and assisting vascular return.

sittingDisease.title: Understanding Sitting Disease
sittingDisease.desc: Extended sitting contributes to obesity, illness, and back pain. CoreChair addresses these issues through continuous, healthy movement that keeps your body engaged.

cta.title: Experience the Benefits
cta.desc: Join thousands who have transformed their sitting experience

hero.title: Engineered for Movement
hero.subtitle: Every curve, every mechanism, every detail designed for your health

philosophy.label: Design Philosophy
philosophy.title: Form Follows Function
philosophy.desc: CoreChair was designed from the ground up to solve the problems of traditional office seating. Every element serves a purpose in promoting healthy, active sitting.

features.title: Sculpted Seat Pan
features.desc: Aggressively shaped to cradle your pelvis and prevent sliding forward. The unique contour distributes pressure evenly for all-day comfort.

features.title: 14-Degree Movement
features.desc: Our patented mechanism allows movement in all directions—forward, back, and side-to-side—keeping your joints mobile and muscles engaged.

features.title: Low Back Support
features.desc: Strategic support at the top of your pelvis maintains optimal posture without restricting movement. Positioned near belt level for natural balance.

features.title: Adjustable Resistance
features.desc: Control how much you move. Start with higher resistance and gradually increase movement as your body adapts to active sitting.

materials.label: Premium Materials
materials.title: Built to Last
materials.desc: Tested to exceed 1 million cycles—far beyond the industry standard of 300,000. We use only high-quality, durable materials backed by an 8-year warranty.

comparison.title: How We Compare
comparison.traditional: Traditional chairs force static posture, leading to muscle fatigue, poor circulation, and back pain.
comparison.ball: Exercise balls lack pelvic support, causing rapid fatigue and postural collapse.
comparison.corechair: CoreChair provides optimal support while encouraging healthy movement—comfortable for hours.

intro.label: Scientific Foundation
intro.title: Developed with Research
intro.desc: CoreChair was developed with a research-based approach to address sitting disease and back pain. We partner with esteemed institutions to validate our claims.

studies.title: Pressure Distribution Study
studies.finding: CoreChair exerts fewer pressure points than standard ergonomic task chairs
studies.detail: Graduate students investigated sitting pressure on CoreChair compared to high-end ergonomic office chairs.

studies.title: Core Muscle Activation
studies.finding: CoreChair engages core muscles on par with exercise balls
studies.detail: Dr. Callaghan's research compared posture and muscle recruitment between CoreChair, ergonomic chairs, and exercise balls.

studies.title: NEAT Certification
studies.detail: The NEAT (Non-Exercise Activity Thermogenesis) program recognizes solutions that increase energy expenditure at low intensity.

studies.title: Posture & Comfort Study
studies.finding: More upright posture with less back stiffness
studies.detail: Participants sitting in CoreChair adopted better posture with lower perceived levels of back stiffness and physical tiredness.

testimonials.name: Tatjana
testimonials.content: I work from home 2 days a week and invested in this chair for my home office. I love love love it. If I go a week without working from home, I notice the difference immediately!

testimonials.name: Barbara B
testimonials.content: I am more than happy with my CoreChair. I love it when I purchase a product that exceeds my expectations. It immediately corrected my poor, slumping posture.

testimonials.name: Laura
testimonials.content: I've been doing nails for over 30 years and the last few years have been terrible on my back. I've used the CoreChair 3 days and noticed a difference INSTANTLY!! WOW!

testimonials.name: Emily
testimonials.content: The Core Chair was recommended by a colleague after back surgery for severe scoliosis. The chair is fantastic—it doesn't trigger my sciatica at all.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CoreChair

items.a: CoreChair has a weight limit of 250 lbs for warranty purposes. However, the chair has been tested through 1 million cycles and can withstand weights in excess of 250 lbs, limited by the hydraulic lift.
Assembly is minimal and takes only 10-15 minutes. The only tool required is a hex key, which is provided and located in the seat pan of your CoreChair.

items.q: Do I need a tall back?
items.a: CoreChair is designed to embrace your pelvis in an engaged sitting position and is not intended as a lounging chair. When properly seated, the sculpted seat and low back work together to position your pelvis upright, encouraging natural spinal balance without added supports.

When sitting balanced with optimal posture, armrests aren't needed. Your upper arms should hang loose by your sides as they do when standing. Armrests can encourage leaning and create unnecessary pressure.

items.q: Is CoreChair good for existing back pain?
items.a: Yes. CoreChair is designed to provide an ideal combination of optimal postural positioning with safe movement. It's an excellent orthopedic intervention and has proven very effective for persons with chronic back pain.

items.q: How does it compare to an exercise ball?
items.a: Unlike exercise balls that lack pelvic support and cause rapid fatigue, CoreChair embraces your pelvis with a sculpted seat and low back support. You get the core benefits without the exhaustion and postural collapse.
We offer a 60-day satisfaction guarantee on Classic, Elite and Sport models, and a 30-day guarantee on Tango and CorePerch. Please keep original packaging for potential returns.

items.q: Will I get tired from moving all day?
items.a: Actually, movement increases energy! When you don't move, blood flow decreases and you feel more tired. CoreChair's gentle movement stimulates circulation and keeps you energized throughout the day.

contact.title: Still have questions?

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing the way the world sits

story.title: A Mission to Transform Sitting
story.p1: CoreChair was established with the aim of creating an innovative active sitting office chair. The goal was to foster healthy workplace environments, focusing on the daily needs of users who spend hours sitting each day.
story.p2: Using expertise in kinesiology and sports medicine, backed by extensive research, CEO & Founder Patrick Harrison has transformed sitting into an active experience.
story.vision: To offer the world's healthiest, ergonomic, and therapeutic office chair.

founder.title: Meet the Founder
founder.name: Patrick Harrison
founder.bio: Recognizing the health detriments of traditional office seating and the inadequacies of exercise balls and standing desks, Harrison created CoreChair to address these issues head-on.

ambassadors.title: Our Ambassadors
ambassadors.desc: Healthcare professionals who see the benefits CoreChair can offer
